texto: The age of the Earth is a hotly debated issue among evangelicals. Old Earthers believe, like most scientists, that the universe is billions of years old. Young Earthers measure the age of the universe in terms of thousands of years.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Norman Geisler: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a reflexao. O trecho “The age of the Earth is a hotly debated issue among evangelicals. Old Earthers believe, like most…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, believe, universe pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de universe e earth.

texto: I can't tell you how Aquinas has enriched and changed my life, my thought. He has helped me to be a better evangelical, a better servant of Christ, and to better defend the faith that was delivered, once for all, to the saints.
explicacao: Citação de Norman Geisler sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. “I can't tell you how Aquinas has enriched and changed my life, my thought. He has helped me to be…” articula vida, thought, me em registro de vida, com relevância para contextos como mudanca e termino.
